references.caption: High-gloss ceramic with lustrous glazed finish featuring contrasting cream and dark patinated surfaces, detailed with hand-painted accents in sage green and oxidized bronze tones; the piece exhibits a polished, reflective quality on select areas against matte earth-toned passages, creating dimensional visual depth through varied surface treatments.

generations.prompt: landscape with river
landscape
